events.title: Where Should You Put Your Savings?

choices.label: Pay the extra $18 to avoid delay
Set aside the full amount now
Wait and hope next check covers it
Call and ask for more time

events.title: Overdraft Warning

choices.label: Wait and hope it works out
Cancel a planned want and cover the bill

events.prompt: Your checking account is running low, and a planned bill is due tomorrow. What do you do?

events.title: Grandparent Gift
events.prompt: Your grandparent gives you birthday money. What do you do with it?

events.title: HYSA Bonus Offer

choices.label: Cut a want and move $10 to savings

events.prompt: Your bank offers a small HYSA bonus if you keep saving steadily. What do you do?

events.title: Streaming Bill Hits

choices.label: Keep it and cover the bill
Pull from savings to cover it

events.prompt: A subscription renewal posts sooner than you expected. What do you do?

events.title: Textbook Fee

choices.label: Ask about a simple payment plan
Delay it and hope nothing happens

events.prompt: A class fee or textbook cost comes up. What do you do?

events.title: Bank Fee Notice

choices.label: Cover it and adjust your budget
Call to ask if the fee can be waived

events.prompt: Your bank posts a small service fee. What do you do?

events.title: Cash Envelope Challenge

choices.label: Set a small cash limit for wants

events.prompt: You want better control over your wants this month. What do you do?

events.title: Reinvest Decision

choices.label: Take it from checking and invest it
Cut wants and invest the difference

events.prompt: A small amount is available to reinvest. Where should the money come from?

events.title: CD Lock-In

choices.label: Keep the money in flexible savings
Keep the money in checking for now

events.prompt: A CD option offers stronger growth if you can leave the money alone. What do you do?

events.title: Bill Reminder Alert

choices.label: Move money from savings and pay it
Wait and risk the due date

events.prompt: You get an alert that a payment is due tomorrow. What do you do?

events.title: Cash Gift Split

choices.label: Split it between checking, savings, and fun

events.prompt: You get a small cash gift. What do you do?

events.title: Build an Overdraft Buffer

choices.label: Move $15 into checking as a buffer
Cut wants and leave the money in checking

events.prompt: Your checking is getting thin. What do you do?

events.title: Card Purchase Decision

choices.label: Use the card only if you can cover it
Use the card because it is convenient
Wait until you have cash ready

events.prompt: A purchase would be easier on your card, but your balance matters. What do you do?

events.title: Auto-Save Toggle
events.prompt: Your bank offers automatic saving each month. What do you do?

events.title: Lunch Budget Plan

choices.label: Set a tiny snack budget only

events.prompt: You want to avoid random lunch spending this month. What do you do?

events.title: Emergency Jar

choices.label: Wait until you have more money
Use gift or bonus money to start it

events.prompt: You want a little backup for surprises. What do you do?

events.title: Loan Payment Due

choices.label: Pay part now and plan the rest

events.prompt: A payment is due on something you financed. What do you do?

events.title: Unexpected Car Cost

choices.label: Adjust your budget to cover it
Use savings to protect the month
Delay another bill to cover it

events.prompt: Transportation or car-related costs rise this month. What do you do?

events.title: Apartment Deposit Target
events.prompt: You want to be ready for a housing deposit later. What do you do?

events.title: Investment Mix Choice
events.prompt: You have a little money set aside. What do you do with it?

events.title: Fee Reversal Chance

choices.label: Just pay it and move on

events.prompt: You may be able to get a fee reversed if you ask. What do you do?

events.title: Micro-Budget Week

choices.label: Just guess your way through the week
Pause fun spending until next check

events.prompt: Money is tight this week. What do you do?

events.title: Savings Goal Tracker

choices.label: Raise the goal and challenge yourself

events.prompt: You can update your savings goal tracker today. What do you do?
